title: scaevola tournoa
intro: Scaevola tournoa, also known as the Blue Fan Flower, is a tropical flowering plant native to the Pacific Islands. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a potential remedy for wounds and skin irritations. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Scaevola tournoa, such as tea and tinctures, can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent, and are used for their therapeutic properties.
